description_long: This is a patchwork stuffed bear toy with a whimsical, handmade appearance. Its body is divided into pastel-colored fabric sections, including pink, beige, blue, green, and orange, all joined together with visible white stitches. The bear has mismatched button eyes—one pink and one blue—and a small, round, beige snout with a stitched black nose and a simple stitched mouth. A red fabric tie is sewn onto its chest, adding a playful accessory. The arms and legs are elongated and cylindrical, each in a different pastel color, and the bear's ears and limbs are also stitched on, enhancing its patchwork look.
description: A pastel patchwork stuffed bear with button eyes, visible stitches, and a red tie. Its limbs and body are made from various colored fabrics, giving it a handmade, whimsical appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's mismatched button eyes, stitched snout, red tie, and multicolored limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue left leg, green left arm, and the profile of the bear's face and ear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patchwork seam running down the back, the back of the ears, and the multicolored arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the orange right leg, yellow right arm, and the side profile of the head and ear.
attribute_facial_expression: The bear has a neutral, slightly quirky expression with mismatched button eyes and a simple stitched mouth. The asymmetry of the eyes gives it a playful, whimsical look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms extended outward and legs spread apart, giving a relaxed and approachable posture.
